import React from "react"; import Slider from "react-slick"; import "slick-carousel/slick/slick.css"; import "slick-carousel/slick/slick-theme.css"; import Navbar from "../NavBar/NavBar"; import "./HomePage.css"; const HomePage = () => { // Slider settings For Small Screen const settings1 = { dots: true, infinite: true, speed: 500, slidesToShow: 1, slidesToScroll: 1, }; // Slider settings For Large Screen const settings = { dots: true, infinite: false, speed: 500, slidesToShow: 4, slidesToScroll: 4, initialSlide: 0, responsive: [ { breakpoint: 1024, settings: { slidesToShow: 3, slidesToScroll: 3, infinite: true, dots: true } }, { breakpoint: 600, settings: { slidesToShow: 2, slidesToScroll: 2, initialSlide: 2 } }, { breakpoint: 480, settings: { slidesToShow: 1, slidesToScroll: 1 } } ] }; return(

Welcome To Our MunchyWay

Delicious meals, delivered fresh to your doorstep! Explore our wide range of mouth-watering dishes, from sizzling street food to gourmet delights.

{/* Why Choose Us */}

Why Choose Us?

Fresh & Quality Ingredients

We use only the best, freshest ingredients for every meal.

Fast & Reliable Delivery

Your favorite food, delivered hot and on time.

Wide Variety of Dishes

From Indian curries to continental delights, we have something for everyone.

Easy & Secure Payments

Multiple payment options for a hassle-free experience.

{/* Our Menu */}

Our Special Foods...

Indian Delicacies

Authentic flavors from across India.

Fast Foods

Burgers, pizzas, and everything in between.

Desserts

Indulge in cakes, pastries, and sweets.

Beverages

Refreshing drinks, shakes, and coffees.

Indian Delicacies

Authentic flavors from across India.

Fast Foods

Burgers, pizzas, and everything in between.

Desserts

Indulge in cakes, pastries, and sweets.

Beverages

Refreshing drinks, shakes, and coffees.
{/* Our Cheff */}

Meet Our Chef

Raghavendra

Trained at the prestigious YouTube Academy of Cooking Disasters, Chef Raghav believes that recipes are just "suggestions" and that the best dishes are created with a little chaos. His signature dish, Mystery Surprise, has been described as "unexpected," "bold," and occasionally "a fire hazard."

{/* Order Now */}

Order Now & Enjoy!

Browse our menu, place an order, and experience the joy of great food!

) } export default HomePage;
